ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross revenue of the movie */,
  "num_voted_users" INTEGER /* Number of users who voted for the movie */,
  "num_critic_for_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of critical reviews for the movie */,
  "num_user_for_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews for the movie */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDb score of the movie */,
  "movie_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the movie */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the movie */,
  "movie_imdb_link" TEXT /* Link to the IMDb page of the movie */,
  "facenumber_in_poster" INTEGER /* Number of faces detected in the movie poster */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13) */,
  "superstar" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie features a superstar */,
  "years_old" INTEGER /* Age of the movie in years */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution company */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "trailer_link" TEXT /* Link to the movie trailer */,
  "poster_link" TEXT /* Link to the movie poster */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_content_rating FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating") REFERENCES content_ratings ("rating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Director's birthdate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Director's personal website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Director's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Director's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Actor's birthdate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Actor's nationality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Actor's personal website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Actor's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Actor's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "actor_role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "billing_position" INTEGER /* Position in the credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the distributor was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Distributor website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Writer's birthdate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Writer's nationality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Writer's personal website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Writer's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Writer's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Producer's birthdate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the producer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Producer's nationality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Producer's personal website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Producer's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Producer's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, actor, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
